name: Compute Optimal LP Token Amounts
description: Calculate the maximum-liquidity token amounts for a given tick range given available token balances
detail: Given a pool's current sqrtPriceX96 and available token balances, computes the exact token0 and token1 amounts that maximize liquidity for the specified tick range. Returns values that satisfy the Uniswap V3 LiquidityAmounts invariant — amount0Desired and amount1Desired are ready to pass directly to the NonfungiblePositionManager mint or increaseLiquidity functions. Any remaining tokens after minting can be swapped to rebalance the ratio.
triggers: how much to deposit in LP

pool.description: Uniswap V3 pool address (reads current sqrtPriceX96)

tickLower.description: Lower tick of the target range (must be spacing-aligned, use calculate-range action to compute)

tickUpper.description: Upper tick of the target range (must be spacing-aligned, use calculate-range action to compute)

examples.input: Compute optimal WETH/USDC amounts for ticks -200000 to -190000 with 1 WETH and 2000 USDC available
